concepts.name: Chemical Equations
concepts.oneliner: Symbolic representation of a chemical change.
concepts.commonError: Not balancing the equation properly.

concepts.name: Law of Conservation of Mass
concepts.keyFormula: Mass of reactants = Mass of products
concepts.oneliner: Mass is neither created nor destroyed in a reaction.
concepts.commonError: Thinking mass can change if gas escapes.

concepts.name: Combination Reactions
concepts.oneliner: Two or more reactants combine to form a single product.
concepts.commonError: Confusing with displacement reactions.

concepts.name: Decomposition Reactions
concepts.oneliner: A single reactant breaks down into multiple products.
concepts.commonError: Forgetting that decomposition usually requires energy (heat/light).

concepts.name: Displacement Reactions
concepts.oneliner: More reactive element displaces less reactive one.
concepts.commonError: Displacing a more reactive metal with a less reactive one.

concepts.name: Double Displacement Reactions
concepts.oneliner: Exchange of ions between reactants to form new compounds.
concepts.commonError: Thinking all double displacements are precipitations.

concepts.name: Redox Reactions
concepts.oneliner: Simultaneous loss and gain of oxygen or electrons.
concepts.commonError: Identifying the product as the oxidized/reduced substance instead of the reactant.

concepts.name: Nature of Acids and Bases
concepts.oneliner: Acids produce H+ ions; Bases produce OH- ions in water.
concepts.commonError: Thinking all hydrogen-containing compounds are acidic.

concepts.name: pH Scale
concepts.oneliner: Measurement of acidity or alkalinity (0-14).
concepts.commonError: Thinking high pH means high acidity.

concepts.name: Neutralization Reaction
concepts.oneliner: Reaction between H+ and OH- to form water.
concepts.commonError: Assuming the resulting salt is always neutral (pH 7).

concepts.name: Chlor-alkali Process
concepts.oneliner: Electrolysis of brine to produce sodium hydroxide and chlorine.
concepts.commonError: Confusing products at anode and cathode.

concepts.name: Bleaching Powder
concepts.oneliner: Produced by action of chlorine on dry slaked lime.
concepts.commonError: Writing formula as CaClO2.

concepts.name: Baking Soda & Washing Soda
concepts.oneliner: Sodium salts used in cooking and cleaning.
concepts.commonError: Confusing the formulas of the two sodas.

concepts.name: Plaster of Paris
concepts.oneliner: Hemihydrate of calcium sulphate used in medicine and construction.
concepts.commonError: Mixing up the amount of water of crystallization.

concepts.name: Physical Properties
concepts.oneliner: Malleability, ductility, and conductivity differences.
concepts.commonError: Assuming all metals are solids at room temperature (Mercury exception).

concepts.name: Chemical Properties of Metals
concepts.oneliner: Reactions with oxygen, water, and acids.
concepts.commonError: Thinking all metals react with cold water.

concepts.name: Reactivity Series
concepts.oneliner: List of metals in decreasing order of reactivity.
concepts.commonError: Misplacing Hydrogen in the series.

concepts.name: Ionic Compounds
concepts.oneliner: Formed by transfer of electrons from metal to non-metal.
concepts.commonError: Assuming ionic compounds conduct in solid state.

concepts.name: Metallurgy: Extraction
concepts.oneliner: Process of obtaining pure metal from its ore.
concepts.commonError: Confusing roasting (with air) and calcination (limited air).

concepts.name: Refining of Metals
concepts.oneliner: Purification using electrolysis.
concepts.commonError: Putting impure metal at the cathode.

concepts.name: Corrosion and Prevention
concepts.oneliner: Deterioration of metals and methods like galvanization.
concepts.commonError: Thinking galvanization is done with copper.

concepts.name: Covalent Bonding
concepts.oneliner: Carbon forms bonds by sharing its 4 valence electrons.
concepts.commonError: Thinking carbon forms C4+ or C4- ions.

concepts.name: Versatile Nature of Carbon
concepts.oneliner: Ability to form long chains and four bonds.
concepts.commonError: Underestimating the number of possible carbon compounds.

concepts.name: Saturated and Unsaturated Hydrocarbons
concepts.oneliner: Alkanes (single), Alkenes (double), and Alkynes (triple bonds).
concepts.commonError: Mixing up the general formulas.

concepts.name: Functional Groups
concepts.oneliner: Atoms or groups determining chemical properties.
concepts.commonError: Identifying alcohol as -CHO or vice versa.

concepts.name: Homologous Series
concepts.oneliner: Series of compounds with same functional group.
concepts.commonError: Thinking members have different chemical properties.

concepts.name: Chemical Properties of Carbon
concepts.oneliner: Key reactions of hydrocarbons.
concepts.commonError: Addition reactions occurring in saturated hydrocarbons.

concepts.name: Soaps and Detergents
concepts.oneliner: Cleansing action via hydrophilic and hydrophobic ends.
concepts.commonError: Thinking soaps work well in hard water.

concepts.name: Early Attempts
concepts.oneliner: Dobereiner and Newlands' grouping based on atomic mass.
concepts.commonError: Thinking these laws applied to all known elements.

concepts.name: Mendeleev's Periodic Table
concepts.oneliner: Elements arranged by mass with gaps for undiscovered ones.
concepts.commonError: Ignoring the isotopes and cobalt-nickel anomaly.

concepts.name: Modern Periodic Law
concepts.oneliner: Henry Moseley's classification based on atomic number.
concepts.commonError: Confusing with Mendeleev's mass-based law.

concepts.name: Groups and Periods
concepts.oneliner: The vertical and horizontal layout of the table.
concepts.commonError: Thinking group number equals number of shells.

concepts.name: Trends: Valency & Size
concepts.oneliner: Valency varies 1-4-0; size decreases across, increases down.
concepts.commonError: Thinking atomic size increases across a period due to more electrons.

concepts.name: Trends: Metallic Character
concepts.oneliner: Decreases across a period, increases down a group.
concepts.commonError: Forgetting non-metals are on the right side.

concepts.name: Autotrophic Nutrition
concepts.oneliner: Plants making food using light, CO2, and water.
concepts.commonError: Thinking photosynthesis happens at night.

concepts.name: Heterotrophic Nutrition
concepts.oneliner: Obtaining energy from other organisms (Holozoic, Saprophytic, Parasitic).
concepts.commonError: Confusing saprophytes with parasites.

concepts.name: Digestion in Humans
concepts.oneliner: Breakdown of food into absorbable molecules.
concepts.commonError: Assuming digestion starts in the stomach.

concepts.name: Respiration: Aerobic vs Anaerobic
concepts.oneliner: Release of energy from food with or without oxygen.
concepts.commonError: Confusing respiration with simple breathing.

concepts.name: Human Respiratory System
concepts.oneliner: Lungs, alveoli, and gas exchange mechanisms.
concepts.commonError: Thinking Alveoli are part of the circulatory system.

concepts.name: Transportation in Humans
concepts.oneliner: Heart pumping blood through pulmonary and systemic circuits.
concepts.commonError: Confusing artery and vein functions in pulmonary circuit.

concepts.name: Transportation in Plants
concepts.oneliner: Movement of water and nutrients using transpiration pull and translocation.
concepts.commonError: Thinking phloem transport is only downwards.

concepts.name: Excretion in Humans
concepts.oneliner: Removal of nitrogenous waste via kidneys.
concepts.commonError: Confusing nephron with neuron.

concepts.name: Nervous System: Neurons
concepts.oneliner: Functional units that transmit electrical impulses.
concepts.commonError: Thinking electrical signals cross the synapse directly.

concepts.name: Reflex Action
concepts.oneliner: Sudden, involuntary response to a stimulus.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the brain is always involved in the immediate reflex loop.

concepts.name: Human Brain
concepts.oneliner: The main coordinating center of the body.
concepts.commonError: Confusing the functions of Cerebrum and Cerebellum.

concepts.name: Plant Hormones (Phytohormones)
concepts.oneliner: Chemicals controlling growth and responses in plants.
concepts.commonError: Thinking all plant hormones promote growth (ABA inhibits).

concepts.name: Plant Movements
concepts.oneliner: Directional (tropism) and non-directional (nastic) movements.
concepts.commonError: Calling the 'Touch-me-not' closure a tropism.

concepts.name: Endocrine System
concepts.oneliner: Glands secreting hormones like Insulin, Adrenaline, Thyroxin.
concepts.commonError: Mixing up the target organs for various hormones.

concepts.name: Asexual Reproduction
concepts.oneliner: Reproduction involving a single parent.
concepts.commonError: Confusing binary fission (Amoeba) with multiple fission (Plasmodium).

concepts.name: Vegetative Propagation
concepts.oneliner: Asexual reproduction in plants using vegetative parts.
concepts.commonError: Thinking it creates more genetic variation than sexual reproduction.

concepts.name: Sexual Reproduction in Flowering Plants
concepts.oneliner: Formation of seeds via male and female gametes.
concepts.commonError: Confusing pollination with fertilization.

concepts.name: Human Male Reproductive System
concepts.oneliner: Production of sperm and male hormones in testes.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the prostate gland produces sperm.

concepts.name: Human Female Reproductive System
concepts.oneliner: Production of eggs and female hormones; Menstrual cycle.
concepts.commonError: Misunderstanding the site of fertilization (it's the Fallopian tube).

concepts.name: Reproductive Health & Contraception
concepts.oneliner: Methods to prevent pregnancy and STDs.
concepts.commonError: Thinking chemical methods (pills) protect against STDs.

concepts.name: Accumulation of Variation
concepts.oneliner: Small differences appearing in offspring due to reproduction.
concepts.commonError: Thinking asexual reproduction shows no variation at all.

concepts.name: Mendel's Laws of Inheritance
concepts.oneliner: Rules governing the transfer of traits from parents.
concepts.commonError: Confusing genotype with phenotype.

concepts.name: Sex Determination
concepts.oneliner: Genetic mechanism determining the gender of a child.
concepts.commonError: Blaming the mother for the gender of the child.

concepts.name: Acquired vs Inherited Traits
concepts.oneliner: Traits learned vs traits passed via DNA.
concepts.commonError: Thinking acquired traits (like muscle mass) are inherited.

concepts.name: Speciation
concepts.oneliner: Formation of new and distinct species in the course of evolution.
concepts.commonError: Thinking an individual evolves (only populations do).

concepts.name: Evidence for Evolution
concepts.oneliner: Morphological and anatomical evidence of common ancestry.
concepts.commonError: Confusing homologous (same origin) with analogous (same function).

concepts.name: Reflection Laws & Plane Mirrors
concepts.oneliner: Bouncing back of light from surfaces.
concepts.commonError: Measuring angles with the surface instead of the normal.

concepts.name: Spherical Mirrors
concepts.oneliner: Concave and convex mirrors and their terminology.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the focus is always in front of the mirror (virtual focus for convex).

concepts.name: Mirror Formula and Magnification
concepts.oneliner: Relating object distance, image distance, and focal length.
concepts.commonError: Incorrect sign convention for 'u' (always negative).

concepts.name: Refraction & Refractive Index
concepts.oneliner: Bending of light as it moves between media.
concepts.commonError: Thinking light bends away from normal when entering a denser medium.

concepts.name: Spherical Lenses
concepts.oneliner: Image formation by convex and concave lenses.
concepts.commonError: Confusing lens shapes with mirror behaviors.

concepts.name: Lens Formula and Magnification
concepts.oneliner: Mathematical relationship for lenses.
concepts.commonError: Confusing the minus sign in lens formula with the plus in mirror formula.

concepts.name: Power of a Lens
concepts.oneliner: Degree of convergence or divergence.
concepts.commonError: Using focal length in cm without converting to meters.

chapterName: Human Eye and the Colorful World
subject: Physics

concepts.name: Human Eye Structure
concepts.oneliner: Anatomy and function of eye parts.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the lens does all the refraction (cornea does most).

concepts.name: Accommodation Power
concepts.oneliner: Ability to change focal length to see near and far.
concepts.commonError: Assuming the near point is the same for everyone.

concepts.name: Defects of Vision
concepts.oneliner: Focusing errors and their corrections.
concepts.commonError: Using a convex lens to correct myopia.

concepts.name: Dispersion through Prism
concepts.oneliner: Splitting of white light into its component colors.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the prism creates colors (it only separates them).

concepts.name: Atmospheric Refraction
concepts.oneliner: Twinkling of stars and early sunrise/delayed sunset.
concepts.commonError: Attributing twinkling to scattering instead of refraction.

concepts.name: Scattering of Light
concepts.oneliner: Color of sky and sun at sunrise/sunset.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the sky is blue because it reflects the ocean.

concepts.name: Electric Current and Circuit
concepts.oneliner: Rate of flow of electric charge.
concepts.commonError: Confusing the direction of conventional current with electron flow.

concepts.name: Potential Difference
concepts.oneliner: Work done to move a unit charge.
concepts.commonError: Thinking potential difference is the same as current.

concepts.name: Ohm's Law
concepts.oneliner: Voltage is proportional to current at constant temp.
concepts.commonError: Applying it to components where temperature varies significantly.

concepts.name: Resistance & Resistivity
concepts.oneliner: Factors affecting the opposition to current flow.
concepts.commonError: Thinking resistivity depends on length or area (it's material specific).

concepts.name: Combination of Resistors
concepts.oneliner: Calculating total resistance in series and parallel.
concepts.commonError: Adding resistors in parallel like they are in series.

concepts.name: Heating Effect of Current
concepts.oneliner: Production of heat due to resistance.
concepts.commonError: Using 'V' in the formula without accounting for R change.

concepts.name: Electric Power
concepts.keyFormula: P = VI = I^2 R = V^2 / R
concepts.oneliner: Rate at which electrical energy is consumed.
concepts.commonError: Using incorrect units (Power should be in Watts).

concepts.name: Magnetic Field Lines
concepts.oneliner: Visualizing the strength and direction of magnetic fields.
concepts.commonError: Thinking field lines can intersect.

concepts.name: Field due to Current-Carrying Wires
concepts.oneliner: Magnetic field around straight wires and circular loops.
concepts.commonError: Using the wrong hand for the rule.

concepts.name: Solenoid
concepts.oneliner: Coil acting as a bar magnet when current flows.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the field inside is zero (it's uniform).

concepts.name: Force on a Conductor
concepts.oneliner: Force experienced by a wire in a magnetic field.
concepts.commonError: Confusing Forefinger (Field) with Middle finger (Current).

concepts.name: Electromagnetic Induction
concepts.oneliner: Generating current by moving a magnet relative to a coil.
concepts.commonError: Thinking induction happens if both magnet and coil are stationary.

concepts.name: Domestic Circuits
concepts.oneliner: Safety features like fuses and earthing.
concepts.commonError: Connecting the fuse to the neutral wire.

concepts.name: Conventional Sources
concepts.oneliner: Coal, petroleum, and their environmental impacts.
concepts.commonError: Thinking fossil fuels are renewable.

concepts.name: Hydro and Wind Energy
concepts.oneliner: Mechanical sources of power generation.
concepts.commonError: Ignoring the ecological damage of big dams.

concepts.name: Solar Energy
concepts.oneliner: Harnessing energy directly from the sun.
concepts.commonError: Thinking solar cells work at full efficiency on cloudy days.

concepts.name: Bio-mass and Bio-gas
concepts.oneliner: Energy from organic waste.
concepts.commonError: Confusing bio-gas with natural gas (LPG).

concepts.name: Nuclear Energy
concepts.oneliner: Energy from fission or fusion of atoms.
concepts.commonError: Thinking current power plants use fusion (they use fission).

concepts.name: Ecosystem Components
concepts.oneliner: Interacting living and non-living parts of nature.
concepts.commonError: Forgetting that humans are part of the ecosystem.

concepts.name: Food Chains and Webs
concepts.oneliner: Flow of energy and matter through trophic levels.
concepts.commonError: Thinking energy flow is bidirectional (it's unidirectional).

concepts.name: Biological Magnification
concepts.oneliner: Increase in toxic concentration at higher trophic levels.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the concentration is highest at the producer level.

concepts.name: Ozone Layer Depletion
concepts.oneliner: Destruction of the protective layer by pollutants.
concepts.commonError: Thinking the 'hole' is a physical hole in the air.

concepts.name: Waste Management
concepts.oneliner: Handling and reducing garbage disposal issues.
concepts.commonError: Assuming all plastic is biodegradable.

concepts.name: Sustainable Management
concepts.oneliner: Refuse, Reduce, Reuse, Repurpose, Recycle.
concepts.commonError: Thinking recycling is the most efficient of the R's (Reducing is).

concepts.name: Forests and Wildlife
concepts.oneliner: Importance of conservation and stakeholder roles.
concepts.commonError: Excluding local people from conservation efforts.

concepts.name: Water Harvesting
concepts.oneliner: Traditional and modern methods to save water.
concepts.commonError: Thinking dams are the only way to manage water.

concepts.name: Coal and Petroleum Conservation
concepts.oneliner: Reducing dependency on finite fossil fuel resources.
concepts.commonError: Underestimating the time taken for these to form.
